calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2004 Continued To Apr-26-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona counsel is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 4/26/2004 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee. (212)
